type.prompt: Review the bright-hawk multiclaude worker progress on the ws-mcp bridge. Check its worktree at /Users/whit/.multiclaude/wts/ws-mcp/bright-hawk — it should be: 1) fixing go.mod (adding gorilla/websocket), 2) fixing HandleFilter syntax error in src/internal/mcp/handlers.go, 3) wiring main.go to instantiate RingBuffer/Hub/Router, 4) getting go test ./... green. Report what's done, what's not, and flag any issues.

Review two parallel multiclaude workers on ws-mcp:

1. silly-fox (Phase 2): Implementing MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 server. Worktree: /Users/whit/.multiclaude/wts/ws-mcp/silly-fox, branch: work/silly-fox. Should be creating JSON-RPC dispatch, report.summary handler, wiring into main.go with HTTP+stdio transport, adding tests.

2. brave-raccoon (Phase 3): MCP server config and integration docs. Worktree: /Users/whit/.multiclaude/wts/ws-mcp/brave-raccoon, branch: work/brave-raccoon. Should be creating .mcp.json, scripts, README updates, smoke test.

Check git log and go test in each worktree periodically. Flag any issues, conflicts between the two workers, or deviations from task. When both have pushed and tests pass, emit REVIEW_COMPLETE.
